creator: dinoex@FreeBSD.org
text:
FreeBSD 9.3-RELEASE / pkg-1.3.7

Fails to build as X11/extensions/XInput2.h is not found.

The file is only in this location:
/usr/local/include/X11/extensions/XInput2.h

Please check.

cd /usr/ports/print/tex-xdvik && make clean package
